label: daemon_multiple_instances
summary: Multiple daemon instances can start simultaneously, stealing multicast packets via SO_REUSEPORT

history.note: Found 3 daemon instances running on port 8702. SO_REUSEPORT causes kernel to round-robin multicast packets between them. Conmon responses from slow devices (AD4D, LX-DANTE) were delivered to wrong instance. Daemon should check for existing instances before starting.
Socket probe before startup raises DaemonAlreadyRunningError, added CMD_SHUTDOWN protocol command, server stop works
